creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
This is the CMU American English pronunciation dictionary for the Festival
speech synthesis system.  It depends on Festival (ports/21182). This port
is based on the NetBSD port.  Please retain the line saying so, and the
NetBSD tags, when committing it.

Fix: 

http://jpj.net/~trevor/freebsd/ports/festlex-cmu.shar
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
